ddls:
CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "exam_roll_no" TEXT /* Exam roll number of the student */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Department the student belongs to */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date when the student enrolled in the university */,
  "graduation_date" TEXT /* Expected or actual graduation date */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the student (e.g., enrolled, graduated, withdrawn) */,
  "advisor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the academic advisor */,
  "semester" TEXT /* Current semester of the student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_advisor_id FOREIGN KEY ("advisor_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "dean_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dean of the department */,
  "office_location" TEXT /* Location of the department office */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the department */,
  "email" TEXT /* Contact email for the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_departments_dean_id FOREIGN KEY ("dean_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grades" (
  "grade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each grade */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Student who received the grade */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Course for which the grade was received */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Grade received (e.g., A, B, C, D, F) */,
  "semester" TEXT /* Semester in which the grade was received */,
  "grade_date" TEXT /* Date when the grade was recorded */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor who recorded the grade */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("grade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grades_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grades_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grade_points" (
  "grade_point_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each grade point */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Grade (e.g., A, B, C, D, F) */,
  "points" REAL /* Points corresponding to the grade */,
  "is_passing" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the grade is passing (true) or failing (false) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the grade (e.g., 'Excellent', 'Good', 'Fair') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("grade_point_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gpa_calculations" (
  "gpa_calculation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each GPA calculation */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Student for whom the GPA was calculated */,
  "sgpa" REAL /* SGPA of the student */,
  "semester" TEXT /* Semester for which the GPA was calculated */,
  "cgpa" REAL /* Cumulative GPA of the student */,
  "total_credits" INTEGER /* Total number of credits considered for the GPA calculation */,
  "calculation_date" TEXT /* Date when the GPA was last calculated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gpa_calculation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gpa_calculations_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transcripts" (
  "transcript_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transcript */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Student for whom the transcript was generated */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Course for which the grade was received */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Grade received (e.g., A, B, C, D, F) */,
  "grade_point" REAL /* Grade point corresponding to the grade */,
  "semester" TEXT /* Semester for which the transcript was generated */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor who recorded the grade */,
  "transcript_date" TEXT /* Date when the transcript was generated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transcript_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transcripts_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transcripts_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., student, instructor, administrator) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User who accessed the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the user accessed the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the system */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
